title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Weekend Drama Workshop
questions.text: Spend Saturday learning how actors use movement on stage. Wear clothes that are easy to move in. Participants do not need to prepare a speech, as all activities will be done in groups.
questions.question: What should participants know?

options.B: They should wear suitable clothes for movement.
options.A: They must prepare a speech before Saturday.
options.C: They will work alone during every activity.

questions.explanation: The workshop involves movement, so suitable clothes are needed.

questions.heading: Message from Megan to Ali
questions.text: Ali, the science club meeting is shorter today because the teacher has another appointment. We’ll build the model next week, but today we’re just planning who brings each material.
questions.question: What is Megan telling Ali?

options.C: They will only organise the project today.
options.A: Science club has been cancelled completely.
options.B: The model must be finished today.

questions.explanation: Today’s shorter meeting is for planning materials, not building the model.

questions.heading: Swimming Pool Lockers
questions.text: Locker keys must be returned before you leave the swimming pool. Lost keys cost £5 to replace. If a locker does not open properly, ask staff instead of forcing it.
questions.question: What does the notice tell swimmers?

options.A: Get help if there is a locker problem.
options.B: Pay five pounds before using lockers.
options.C: Leave locker keys at home safely.

questions.explanation: Swimmers should ask staff if a locker does not open.

questions.heading: From: Dad / Subject: Your tablet
questions.text: I updated your tablet this morning, but one game no longer opens. The school apps are working, so you can still use it for homework tonight. I’ll check the game later.
questions.question: What is Dad saying?

options.B: The tablet is still useful for schoolwork.
options.A: The tablet cannot be used tonight.
options.C: All apps stopped working after the update.

questions.explanation: The school apps are working, so homework can still be done.

questions.heading: Local Market Stall
questions.text: Our bread is baked early each morning. If you want a large loaf, please order the day before, as they often sell out by lunchtime. Small rolls are usually available all day.
questions.question: What does the advert advise customers?

options.C: Order some bread early to avoid disappointment.
options.A: Buy small rolls only before lunchtime.
options.B: Collect large loaves before they are baked.

questions.explanation: Large loaves often sell out, so ordering ahead is advised.
